news.t: Bottom of the Stack: ETFs Fueling the AI Power Play
Tech Shift Fuels Double-Digit ETF Gains
Tide Is Turning in Favor of Clean Energy Stocks
AI Pivot: Electrification Infrastructure in Focus
US sets preliminary antidumping duties on solar imports from India, Indonesia and Laos
Advanced Communications and Electronic Systems (ACES) and Radisys Sign MOU to Accelerate 5G ORAN Innovation and Development

holdings.infoBox: ACES is an equity ETF with a total of 38 individual holdings. The top holdings are First Solar stock at 6.02%, Nextpower at 5.43%, Enphase Energy at 5.30%, Ormat Technologies at 5.17%, and Brookfield Renewable Partners at 5.03%.

overview.description: The ALPS Clean Energy ETF (ACES) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the CIBC Atlas Clean Energy index. The fund tracks an index of US- and Canada-listed companies in the clean energy industry. ACES was launched on Jun 29, 2018 and is issued by SS&C.

data.text: RIYADH, Saudi Arabia & HILLSBORO, Ore.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Advanced Communications and Electronic Systems (ACES) and Radisys Sign MOU to Accelerate 5G ORAN Innovation and Development.
